title: ranunculus flammula var. strigulosus
intro: Ranunculus flammula var. strigulosus, also known as lesser spearwort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus flammula var. strigulosus include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to use caution and consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
